set.name: LDT
set.longname: Last Days of the Immortal Table

card.name: Tiny Beating Hearts
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Target player draws two cards. Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature.

card.name: Knight LDT
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Forsaken Shepherd
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you gain 1 life. If Forsaken Shepherd is modified, you gain 1 life for each creature you control instead. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Meditations on Hunger // Faint Hunger
card.text:
Enchant player Whenever one or more creatures attack enchanted player, that player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
---
Target player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Make Prey of Them
card.text: Bind four Rabbits (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create four 1/1 white Rabbit creature tokens.) Make Prey of Them deals 4 damage to up to one target creature.

card.name: Seeker of Cosmic Ideals
card.text: Seeker of Cosmic Ideals has flying as long as it isn't Human. Forswear {2}{U} ({2}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Oathweaver
card.text: {G}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of {W}, {U}, {B}, and/or {R}.

card.name: Spare Thyself
card.text: Bind a Knight (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you don't, create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.) The next 2 damage that a source of your choice would deal to you and/or permanents you control this turn is dealt to that source's controller instead.

card.name: Be Part of Me
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature. If you sacrificed a creature this way, you gain life equal to that creature's power.

card.name: Skittering Hag
card.text: When Skittering Hag enters the battlefield, until end of turn, up to one target creature has base power and toughness 1/1 and up to one other target creature has base power and toughness 4/4.

card.name: Caelia, the South Star
card.text: Whenever an enchantment spell you control resolves, draw a card and create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with lifelink. Whenever an Omen spell you control resolves, draw a card and create a 1/1 black Spirit creature token with deathtouch and "This creature can't block."

card.name: Mistress of the Hunt
card.text: Forswear {R}{W} ({R}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 2/2 green Hound creature token with haste and lifelink.

card.name: Syr Yseult of Seven Chimes
card.text: Each opponent's maximum hand size is equal to the number of cards in your hand. When you have no cards in hand, you draw a card and you lose 2 life. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: Curse of Asceticism // Broken Comforts
card.text:
Enchant player At the beginning of enchanted player's upkeep, they sacrifice a noncreature, nonbasic permanent. If they do, they may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
---
Destroy target artifact or enchantment. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Ruin to Be Wrought
card.text: Each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest. Unseal. Then if your seal is broken, creatures you control gain protection from everything until your next turn. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Parting Calm Waters
card.text: Counter up to two target spells and/or abilities.

card.name: Immortal Silence
card.text: Choose one or both — • Counter target spell or ability that targets you or a permanent you control. • Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: The Red Grail
card.text: Indestructible When The Red Grail enters, if it was cast, you may put a creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control from your hand onto the battlefield. {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn. You lose life equal to that creature's power.

card.name: Venerable Counsel
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put three of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Spirit LDT
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Spirit LDT
card.text: Deathtouch This creature can't block.

card.name: Hound LDT
card.text: Lifelink, haste

card.name: Blade at Thy Back
card.text: Defender As long as Blade at Thy Back is modified, it can attack as though it didn't have defender and attacks each combat if able. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Now and Forever
card.text: You and target opponent each draw three cards. Until your next turn, creatures that player controls can't attack you. Exile Now and Forever.

card.name: Nyneve, Daybreak's Promise
card.text: Whenever Nyneve attacks, if it's modified, up to one target creature blocks it this combat if able. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Partner—Immortal Table (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: Syr Llyr, Grief's Twilight
card.text: Excess damage dealt to Llyr is dealt to you instead. Forswear {1}{WB}{WB} This creature can't be destroyed by lethal damage. Partner—Immortal Table (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: Martyr of Runes
card.text: {T}: If your seal is broken, up to one target creature you control gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. Otherwise, unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Curse of Failure // Try Again
card.text:
Enchant player When Curse of Failure enters, untap each permanent enchanted player controls. Enchanted player skips their untap step.
---
Take an extra turn after this one. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Drinking of the Grail
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. II — Return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield and put an indestructible counter on it. III — Return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield and put an indestructible counter on it. It has base power and toughness 10/10.

card.name: Hollow Worshipper
card.text: Forswear {2}{R} ({2}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) When this creature dies, it deals 3 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Obsession
card.text: Exile target opponent's graveyard until the end of your next turn. You may play cards exiled this way for as long as they remain exiled, and you may spend mana as thought it were mana of any color to cast those spells.

card.name: Born Beneath Thy Ribs
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Bind two Beasts (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you don't, create two 3/3 green Beast creature tokens.) Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Ravaine, Heir Eternal
card.text: As Ravaine enters the battlefield, if it was cast, choose another creature you control and tap it. The chosen creature has hexproof and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player loses the game."

card.name: Grounded Salvation
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with flying. • Move any number of counters from creatures you control onto another target creature. • Counter target ability from a noncreature, nonland source.

card.name: Abandon All Restraint
card.text: Until end of turn, whenever you activate an ability that isn't a mana ability, you may copy that ability and may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: All Your Many Lives // Shard of Possibility
card.text:
Enchant player You and enchanted player play with the top cards of your libraries revealed. During your turn, you may play cards from the top of your and enchanted player's library.
---
Create a Prophetic Prism token. (It's an artifact that costs {2} with "When this artifact enters, draw a card." and "{1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color." Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Blushing Bride
card.text: Forswear {R} ({R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) Haste

card.name: Brush with Divinity
card.text: Unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) Return all nonland permanents to their owners' hands. If your seal is broken, you may put a permanent card with mana value 5 or less from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Opportunistic Sellsword
card.text: Opportunistic Sellsword can't block. When Opportunistic Sellsword dies, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Deconstruct Identity
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. {3}{B}{B}, Exile Deconstruct Identity from your graveyard: Exile target nonland card from a graveyard. Search its owner's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with the same name as that card and exile them. Then that player shuffles. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Duty
card.text: Vigilance During your turn, Duty has first strike. When Duty enters, exile all graveyards. If a card or token would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

card.name: Her Ladyship The Moon
card.text: Flying, indestructible Her Ladyship The Moon isn't a creature unless your seal is broken. Activated abilities of creature you control cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. Whenever you activate an ability of a creature you control, unseal. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: Meditations on Yearning // Faint Yearning
card.text:
Enchant player At the beginning of combat on your turn, gain control of target creature enchanted player controls until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until of turn.
---
Gain control of target creature with mana value 4 or less until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until of turn. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Ride Ahead
card.text: Bind a Knight (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you don't, create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.) Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Scrying Slab
card.text: When Scrying Slab enters, if you cast it, search your library for up to thirteen cards and exile them, then shuffle. {3}, {T}: Choose a nonland card name, then shuffle and reveal the top card of your library. If that card has the chosen name, you may play it without paying its mana cost. Otherwise, put that card into your hand.

card.name: Shadowreathed Champion
card.text: Whenever one or more modified creatures you control attack, each opponent loses 3 life unless they discard a card or sacrifice a nontoken permanent of their choice. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Whenever an opponent loses life for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 on target creature you control.

card.name: Siobhan, Who Failed
card.text: Forswear loyalty {R} (Put a loyalty counter on Siobhan and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and she's no longer Siobhan. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) [+1]: Amass Warlocks 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Warlock. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Warlock Army creature token first.) [0]: Target opponent discards a card. If they can't, you draw a card. [-1]: Siobhan deals 1 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that permanent was already dealt damage this turn, destroy it instead.

card.name: Sunken Chorus
card.text: When Sunken Chorus enters, each player discards a card. Forswear {3}{B} ({3}{B}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) As long as an opponent has one or fewer cards in hand, this gets +1/+0 and has menace.

card.name: Sworn Sisters
The Anointing of a Champion
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for a creature card with mana value 3 or less and put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. II — Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. It fights up to one target creature you don't control. III — Whenever a creature you control attacks alone this turn, draw cards equal to its power.

card.name: The Crowning of a Princess
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) If this was cast from your hand, destroy all creatures. Players can't cast spells this turn. When you next cast a creature spell this turn, that creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter, flying counter, and lifelink counter on it.

card.name: The Sealing of a God
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Enchant creature This Saga gains "Enchanted creature gets -2/-2." This Saga gains "Enchanted creature can't block." Enchanted creature's controller loses 2 life. Exile enchanted creature.

card.name: The Seeking of a Legend
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance. Scry 2. Whenever one or more creatures deal combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card. Search your library for a noncreature artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. The next spell you cast this turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: The Weaving of a Star
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play a card exiled with this Saga this turn. This deals X damage to each opponent, where X is the number of cards exiled with it. ​

card.name: To Slaughter
card.text: Discard a card, then draw a card. Unseal, then if your seal is broken, draw a card. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Beseech the Lady
card.text: Unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) If your seal is broken, scry 2. Draw a card.

card.name: Lunar Chaplain
card.text: Whenever Lunar Chaplain attacks, if it's modified, it gains indestructible until end of turn. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Leonum Non Refert Quid Oves Censeant
card.text: Double the power of target creature you control until end of turn. Until end of turn, it gains trample and "When this creature deals combat damage to a player, it deals that much damage to you and you exile that many cards from the top of your library. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn." Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Alum of the Rising Moon
card.text: Hexproof from red Vigilance Alum of the Rising Moon can only attack or block alone.

card.name: Cyclekeeper
card.text: Cyclekeeper enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When Cyclekeeper dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Face of Animosity
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Renah of the Waning Sun
card.text: Hexproof from blue Renah of the Waning Sun has first strike during your turn. Renah of the Waning Sun can only attack or block alone.

card.name: Oath of the Immortal Table
card.text: Bind five Knights (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you don't, create five 2/2 white Knight creature tokens with vigilance.) Take an extra turn after this one. Exile Oath of the Immortal Table.

card.name: Schism
card.text: Schism deals 4 damage to any target. When a creature or planeswalker dealt damage this way dies this turn, exile it. Its controller creates a white enchantment token named Grudge with "Spells you cast that share a name with a card you own in exile cost {2} more to cast."

card.name: Catacomb Consecrator
card.text: {2}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. When this creature dies, you may put a creature card with mana value 2 or less exiled with it that you own not named Catacomb Consecrator onto the battlefield.

card.name: Catacomb Hoarder
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 3 life (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, choose a creature card at random from your graveyard. You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, return the chosen card to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Lotus-Pool Fishcat
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may play land cards from the top of your library as long as this creature is untapped. You may cast creature spells from the top of your library as long as this creature is tapped.

card.name: Obelia, Headless Huntress
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Obelia. When Obelia dies, mill cards equal to its power. Put each land card milled this way onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Rise, Again and Again
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, return a creature card at random from your graveyard to your hand. You lose life equal to its power. {W}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Starlight Titan
card.text: First strike Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play those cards. At the beginning of your end step, if there are cards exiled with this creature, put them into their owner's graveyard, then create a 1/1 white Spirit token with lifelink for each card put this way.

card.name: Banished From Heaven
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1. It can't have counters put on it or permanents attached to it. When this enchantment enters, remove all counters from enchanted creature and destroy all other permanents attached to it.

card.name: Secrets in the Stars
card.text: {1}{U}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play the most recently-exiled card exiled with Secrets in the Stars. (Once the most recent card is played, the next-most recent can be played.)

card.name: Undying Loyalist
card.text: Double strike {2}{B}{R}, Tap an untapped modified creature you control: If this card is in your graveyard, exchange it with the creature tapped this way. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: The Merest Taste of Divinity
card.text: You surveil X and gain X life. If X is 4 or less, draw a card. Otherwise, destroy all creatures.

card.name: Wyrdwood Guardian
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 green Forest Dryad land creature token. If that creature was modified, create two of those tokens instead. {5}{G}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. They gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Final Masquerade
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever a creature you control dies, if it had three or more counters on it, exile the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard. If you do, Final Masquerade deals 2 damage to each opponent. Otherwise, you may play that card until the beginning of your next end step.

card.name: Meditations on Devotion // Fleeting Devotion
card.text:
Enchant player At the beginning of combat on enchanted player's turn, they tap an untapped creature they control. If it has power 2 or less, put a stun counter on it.
---
Tap target creature. If it has power 2 or less, put a stun counter on it. Draw a card.

card.name: Timelost Relict
Wyrdwood Dryad
card.text: When this creature enters, mill four cards, then return a land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. {3}{G}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw cards equal to the greatest power among other creatures you control.

card.name: Field of Swords
card.text: At the beginning each end step, if a creature died this turn, put a blade counter on Field of Swords. {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Remove a blade counter from Field of Swords: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Searing Brilliance
card.text: Bind a Reflection (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create an X/X blue Reflection creature token.) Searing Brilliance deals X damage to any target that hasn't been the target of a spell this turn.

card.name: Fervent Bloodletter
card.text: Prowess, prowess Whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Forbidden Hex
card.text: Four target creatures each get -4/-4 until end of turn. (If you can't choose four targets, you can't cast this.)

card.name: The Meek and Many
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create two 1/1 white Rabbit creature tokens. At the beginning of your end step, unseal, then if your seal is broken, create a token that's a copy of a token you control. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Commandeered Barge
card.text: Whenever this Vehicle enters or attacks, unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) As long as the seal is broken, this Vehicle is an 8/8 Kraken creature in addition to its other types. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Seek Unspoiled Lands
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may play land cards from the top of your library or your graveyard. You can't play land cards from your hand. {2}, Exile a land card from your hand: Create two 1/1 green Scout creature tokens.

card.name: A Sliver of Her Might
card.text: Distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control, then you draw a card and lose 1 life for each different power among creatures you control.

card.name: Silverthread Spirit
card.text: Flying Tap three untapped creatures you control: Tap target creature you don't control, then unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) This creature can't attack or block unless the seal is broken.

card.name: Soldier On
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, then put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Flashback {4}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Stone of Swords
card.text: Affinity for modified creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each modified creature you control.) Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, you may pay {X}. When you do, put X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Perennial Penguins
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may sacrifice a land or nontoken artifact. If you do, create an Uncharted Haven token. (It's a land with "This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color." and "{T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.")

card.name: Knight of Unanswered Wishes
card.text: Flying {6}: Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it's modified, you may put a card you own from outside the game into your hand. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Mooncursed Packleader
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. If your seal is broken, double the power and toughness of each creature you control instead. {1}{G}: Unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, the seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Feigned Innocence
card.text: Bind a Rabbit (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you don't, create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token.) You draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Meditations on Truth // Faint Truth
card.text:
Enchant player Whenever enchanted player draws a card, each of their opponents may surveil 1, then draw a card.
---
Surveil 1, then draw a card. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Answerer of Pleas
card.text: Forswear {1}{W} ({1}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) During your turn, this creature has indestructible.

card.name: The Pale Riders of the Mire
card.text: The Pale Riders of the Mire enters with a reach counter, a menace counter, a lifelink counter and a deathtouch counter on it. Whenever a permanent you control leaves the battlefield, if it had counters on it, you may put its counters on target permanent you control.

card.name: Knight of Refraction
card.text: {1}{U}: Create a token that's a copy of target token you control that entered this turn. Activate only during your turn and only once each turn. {1}{U}: Copy target spell you control if it wasn't cast. You may choose new targets for the copy. Activate only during your turn and only once each turn.

card.name: Forsaken Paladin
card.text: Forswear {1}{R} ({1}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) This creature gets +1/-1 for each +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Syr Grgkhshktsh, the Unruly
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Permanents you control have "Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability for the first time each turn, it deals 1 damage to each opponent. If an opponent controlled that spell or ability, it deals 3 damage to each opponent instead."

card.name: Seal Beneath the Lake
card.text: Bind a God (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create a 4/4 blue God creature token with flying.) Shuffle up to one target creature with power 4 or greater and up to two target cards from a single graveyard into their owners' libraries.

card.name: Curse of Moonlight Sickness // Lunar Syzygy
card.text:
Enchant player Whenever this Curse or another enchantment you control enters, enchanted player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {2}: Return this Curse to its owner's hand.
---
Exile the top three cards of each player's library. You may cast up to three spells exiled this way without paying their mana costs. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Curse of Warping Flesh // One Last Oath
card.text:
Enchant player At the beginning of enchanted player's upkeep, they mill half their library, rounded up.
---
Create a tapped 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Stir the Brew
card.text: You get an ingredient counter. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature for each ingredient counter you have. Draw a card. Shuffle Stir the Brew into its owner's library.

card.name: Natural Beauty
card.text: Choose one or more — • Destroy all artifacts. • Destroy all enchantments. • Remove all counters from all permanents.

card.name: War-Hardened Headhunter
card.text: Forswear {2}{R} ({2}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) Double strike

card.name: Familiar's Watch
card.text: Bind a Bird (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create a 1/1 blue Bird creature token with flying.) Counter up to one target spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Keeper of the Grail
card.text: As long as it's your turn, modified permanents you control have hexproof. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target attacking creatures.

card.name: Crystal Clear
card.text: Unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, the seal is broken for the rest of the game.) Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them as long as they were exiled this turn or your seal is broken.

card.name: Aneaena, Timeless Hermit
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, return it to the battlefield with a finality counter on it if it was modified, then put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Hallowed Shieldbearer
Helpful Silversmith
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life. Forswear {W} ({W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) This creature attacking causes its abilities to trigger as though it entered.

card.name: Ancient Lore
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Remove a +1/+1 counter from up to one target creature you control. If you do, draw a card. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Dressed to Kill
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It deals 1 damage to target creature or planeswalker for each modification among modified creatures you control. (Each Equipment, Aura you control, and counter is a modification.)

card.name: Shroud of Moths
card.text: Unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, the seal is broken for the rest of the game.) Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. If your seal is broken, exile it instead.

card.name: Accursed Astrologist
card.text: Whenever an enchantment you control enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life. Cursecycling {1}{B} ({1}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Curse card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Sow the Seeds of Glory
card.text: Unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, the seal is broken for the rest of the game.) Search your library for a basic Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If your seal is broken, untap it.

card.name: Lena of the Lunar Eclipse
card.text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, twice that many are put on that creature instead. Whenever you cast an Aura or Equipment spell, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Blazing Light
card.text: Create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance, then put a +1/+1 counter on each Knight you control.

card.name: Ravaine's Rider
card.text: Forswear {R} ({R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) As long as it's your turn, this creature has flying. {R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Curse of Overwhelming Ennui // Renege
card.text:
Enchant player When this Curse enters, exile target nonland permanent enchanted player controls. Spells enchanted player casts with the same name as the exiled card cost {2} more to cast.
---
Exile target creature you own, then return it to the battlefield under your control. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Vicious Cycle
card.text: If you would draw a card while your library has no cards in it, instead shuffle your graveyard and any number of cards you own in exile into your library, then draw seven cards. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle this card, mill three cards.

card.name: Caelia, the South Star (Promo)
card.text: Whenever an enchantment spell you control resolves, draw a card and create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with lifelink. Whenever an Omen spell you control resolves, draw a card and create a 1/1 black Spirit creature token with deathtouch and "This creature can't block."

card.name: Ruin to be Wrought (Promo)
card.text: Each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest. Unseal. Then if your seal is broken, you may put two +1/+1 counters on a creature you control. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: The Red Grail (Promo)
card.text: Indestructible When The Red Grail enters, if it was cast, you may put a creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control from your hand onto the battlefield. {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn. You lose life equal to that creature's power.

card.name: Lacustrine Prophet
card.text: If you would draw a card, exile the top card of each player's library instead. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast them.

card.name: God LDT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Bird LDT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Bismuth Brawler
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Bloodscent Tracker
card.text: Forswear {2}{G} ({2}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) Trample Damage dealt by this creature can't be prevented.

card.name: Commanding Concubus
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent chooses two — • They sacrifice a creature of their choice. • They sacrifice a noncreature permanent of their choice. • They discard a card at random. • They lose 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: A Heart Enraptured // Heartbreak
card.text:
Enchant player Whenever enchanted player attacks, they lose 3 life unless they sacrifice a creature or discard a creature card.
---
Target opponent loses 3 life, sacrifices a nonland permanent, and discards a card. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: A Millenium Under the Oath
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, put a time counter on A Millenium Under the Oath. When you do, return target permanent card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is the number of time counters on A Millenium Under the Oath.

card.name: Concoction of Strength
card.text: Bind two Wolves (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you don't, create two 2/2 green Wolf creature tokens.) Distribute three +1/+1 counters among any number of creatures. Creatures you control gain vigilance, trample, and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Desperate Cradling
card.text: Bind a Rabbit (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token.) When target creature dies this turn, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Duty Unending
card.text: Bind a Knight (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.) Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Fraying Star-Guide
card.text: When Fraying Star-Guide enters, you may unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) {1}, {T}: Draw a card. Then discard a card unless the seal is broken.

card.name: Glasswork Champion
card.text: Whenever you attack, create a tapped and attacking token that's a copy of target attacking modified creature. Put a +1/+1 counter on the token. Exile that token at end of combat. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Her Gaze Weighs Heavy
card.text: Bind a Beast (When you cast this spell, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't, create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.) Target opponent may have this spell deal 3 damage to them. If that player doesn't, you draw two cards.

card.name: Her Ladyship's Truth
card.text: Enchant creature When Her Ladyship's Truth enters, unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) You control enchanted creature as long as it's your turn or the seal is broken.

card.name: Histories of the Table
card.text: Modified creatures you control have menace. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter up to one target creature.

card.name: Knight-Radiant
card.text: During your turn, Knight-Radiant has first strike. Knight-Radiant gets +1/+1 for each modified creature you control. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Knight's Last Wish
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, put its counters plus an additional charge counter on Knight's Last Wish. {B}, Pay 1 life, Remove two counters from Knight's Last Wish: Draw a card. {3}{B}, Remove four counters from Knight's Last Wish: Each opponent loses 4 life and you gain 4 life.

card.name: Lunar Reflection
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Unseal. Then if the seal is broken, put a flying counter and a vigilance counter on the token. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Meditations on Obligation // Faint Obligation
card.text:
Enchant player Whenever enchanted player casts a noncreature spell, each other player creates a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.
---
Create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: Pristine Blade
Rust-Souled Veteran
card.text: Forswear {1}{B}{B} ({1}{B}{B}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) Deathtouch Whenever this creature attacks, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Safira, High Priestess
card.text: When Safira enters, create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance. Noncreature spells you cast have bind a Knight. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. If you don't copy it, create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.)

card.name: Second Skin
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may remove one counter from any number of creatures you control. This spell costs {1} less for each counter removed this way. Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield with an additional +1/+1 counter on it, then shuffle.

card.name: Silver Apostate
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you cast an Omen spell, if Silver Apostate is a Cleric, put a +1/+1 counter and a vigilance counter on her and she becomes a Human Warlock. Whenever you cast a Curse spell, if Silver Apostate is a Human Warlock, put a +1/+1 counter and a flying counter on her and she becomes a Horror Warlock.

card.name: Sinewtail
card.text: When Sinewtail enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. Modified creatures you control have reach and trample. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Sinking into the Lady's Grasp
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. Then unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, if the seal is broken, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Strike As One
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. Whenever you attack with two or more creatures, untap them and they gain first strike until end of turn. If you attacked with four or more creatures, draw a card.

card.name: Sworn Shortsword
Tainted-Shore Witch
card.text: Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, tap target creature. If that spell was a Curse, put a stun counter on that creature and a +1/+1 counter on Tainted-Shore Witch.

card.name: The Many Oaths of Siobhan
card.text: Time loop (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Remove them all after III.) Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. They gain deathtouch until end of turn. Each player sacrifices a creature.

card.name: The Stars Are Her Hands // Read the Stars
card.text:
Enchant player Whenever a creature deals combat damage to enchanted player, that creature's controller draws a card.
---
Draw two cards. Then discard a card unless you control a Curse. (Then shuffle this card into its owner's library.)

card.name: The Waning of the Sun
card.text: When The Waning of the Sun enters, unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) All creatures get -1/-1. If the seal is broken, instead creatures except for non-Human creatures you control get -1/-1.

card.name: Umbrette, Peculiar Princess
card.text: Whenever you attack, target attacking Warlock gains menace until end of turn. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may pay 1 life. If you do, amass Warlocks 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Warlock. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Warlock Army creature token first.)

card.name: Vitreous Drifter
card.text: Forswear {2}{U} ({2}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) This creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Waters of the Lake
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, unseal. (To unseal, mill two cards, then you may exile cards with total mana value 13 or more from your graveyard. If you do, your seal is broken for the rest of the game.) If you would unseal while the seal is broken, instead mill two cards, then put one of those cards into your hand.

card.name: Wildpath Paragon
card.text: When Wildpath Paragon enters, you gain 3 life. Forswear {1}{G} ({1}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this and up to one other creature. That creature gains the following abilities until end of turn and this is no longer Human. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.) This creature must be blocked if able.

card.name: Drink Deep
card.text: Choose target creature you control, then choose two— • That creature gains hexproof until end of turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. • That creature gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Steel Your Heart
card.text: When Steel Your Heart enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Discard your hand, then draw three cards. • Steel Your Heart deals 3 damage to any target. • Add {R}{R}{R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. • Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token." • You lose the game.
